reviewer.description: Strict code reviewer. Audits Laravel code for security vulns, SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, auth issues, and crypto payment flaws.

docker-up.template: Run `docker compose up -d` from the project root to start all services.

migrate.template: Run `docker compose exec app php artisan migrate` to apply pending migrations.

security-check.description: Scan composer dependencies for known CVEs
security-check.template: Run `vendor/bin/security-checker security:check composer.lock` to scan dependencies for known vulnerabilities.

review.description: Full security review of all staged and unstaged changes
review.template: Run `git diff --cached` and `git diff` to review all changes. Analyze for: SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, mass assignment, authentication gaps, crypto payment logic flaws, and insecure configuration.
